input.prompt:
I have a new C# MCP server project. I need to implement a tool class that
wraps a REST API using HttpClient. The tools should follow MCP SDK conventions
with proper attributes for LLM discovery. Show me the tool class, Program.cs
with stdio transport, and explain how DI works for MCP tools.

data.content:
I have a new C# MCP server project. I need to implement a tool class that
wraps a REST API using HttpClient. The tools should follow MCP SDK conventions
with proper attributes for LLM discovery. Show me the tool class, Program.cs
with stdio transport, and explain how DI works for MCP tools.

input.initialPrompt:
I have a new C# MCP server project. I need to implement a tool class that
wraps a REST API using HttpClient. The tools should follow MCP SDK conventions
with proper attributes for LLM discovery. Show me the tool class, Program.cs
with stdio transport, and explain how DI works for MCP tools.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to create a C# MCP (Model Context Protocol) server project with:
1. A tool class wrapping a REST API using HttpClient
2. Program.cs with stdio transport
3. Explanation of how DI works for MCP tools

Let me create these files and explain the concepts.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "ls /tmp/sv-e1b551dcb0b945f6b37505c8545d9db8/ 2>/dev/null; echo \"---\"; dotnet --version 2>/dev/null || echo \"no dotnet\"", "description": "Check workspace and dotnet availability", "initial_wait": 10}

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: cd /tmp/sv-e1b551dcb0b945f6b37505c8545d9db8 && dotnet new console -n McpServer --no-restore -o . && dotnet add package ModelContextProtocol --prerelease && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.Http
arguments.description: Create project and add MCP SDK packages
